message.content:
@startuml
actor "sidetree-core-go" as scg

box "Instance 1" #LightGray
participant "Operation\nQueue" as OQ1
end box

participant "orb.operation" as ORB

database "op-queue\nDB" as DB

box "Instance 2" #LightGray
participant "Operation\nQueue" as OQ2
end box

OQ1 -> ORB : Subscribe
ORB --> OQ1 : ok

OQ2 -> ORB : Subscribe
ORB --> OQ2 : ok

scg -> OQ1 : Add(op1)
OQ1 -> ORB : Publish(op1)
ORB --> OQ1 : ok
OQ1 --> scg : ok

scg -> OQ2 : Add(op2)
OQ2 -> ORB : Publish(op2)
ORB --> OQ2 : ok
OQ2 --> scg : ok

ORB -> OQ1 : op2
OQ1 --> ORB : ok
OQ1 -> DB : Put(op2,handler1ID,expiry)
DB --> OQ1 : ok
OQ1 -> ORB : Ack(op2)
ORB --> OQ1 : ok

ORB -> OQ2 : op1
OQ2 --> ORB : ok
OQ2 -> DB : Put(op1,handler2ID,expiry)
DB --> OQ2 : ok
OQ2 -> ORB : Ack(op1)
ORB --> OQ2 : ok

@enduml
